use_cases: Displaying task completion progress in project management dashboards
Showing form wizard or onboarding step indicators
Visualizing data metrics like storage usage or budget consumption
Indicating upload or loading progress in applications
Tracking goal completion or milestones in gamified interfaces
ai_summary: A modern progress bar component with customizable color variants (default, secondary, destructive), border styling, and rounded corner options. Features smooth CSS transitions for height and background-color changes, plus optional striped pattern overlay. Designed for universal use across SaaS, fintech, and e-commerce platforms to display completion metrics, loading states, and step indicators with clean, minimalist aesthetics.
